children.label: A
children.text: in the case of an individual who enrolls pursuant to subsection (d) of before the month in which he first satisfies paragraph (1) or (2) of section 1395(a) of this title, the first day of such month,section 1395p of this titleo

children.text: in such month in which he first satisfies such paragraph, the first day of the month following the month in which he so enrolls,

children.label: ii

children.label: iii
children.text: more than one month following such month in which he satisfies such paragraph, the first day of the third month following the month in which he so enrolls,

children.label: C
children.text: in the case of an individual who first satisfies such paragraph in a month beginning on or after , and who enrolls pursuant to such subsection (d) in such month in which he first satisfies such paragraph or in any subsequent month of his initial enrollment period, the first day of the month following the month in which he so enrolls, orJanuary 1, 2023

by the filing of notice that the individual no longer wishes to participate in the insurance program established by this part, or
for nonpayment of premiums.

children.heading: Termination
children.label: c Termination
children.text: In the case of an individual satisfying paragraph (1) of section 1395(a) of this title whose entitlement to hospital insurance benefits under part A is based on a disability rather than on his having attained the age of 65, his coverage period (and his enrollment under this part) shall be terminated as of the close of the last month for which he is entitled to hospital insurance benefits.o

children.heading: Payment of expenses incurred during coverage period
children.label: d Payment of expenses incurred during coverage period
children.text: No payments may be made under this part with respect to the expenses of an individual unless such expenses were incurred by such individual during a period which, with respect to him, is a coverage period.

children.heading: Commencement of coverage for special enrollment periods
children.label: e Commencement of coverage for special enrollment periods

children.text: in any month of the special enrollment period in which the individual is at any time enrolled in a plan (specified in subparagraph (A) or (B), as applicable, of or specified in ) or in the first month following such a month, the coverage period shall begin on the first day of the month in which the individual so enrolls (or, at the option of the individual, on the first day of any of the following three months), orsection 1395p(i)(3) of this titlesection 1395p(i)(4)(A)(i) of this title
in any other month of the special enrollment period, the coverage period shall begin on the first day of the month following the month in which the individual so enrolls.

children.heading: Commencement of coverage for certain volunteers serving outside United States
children.label: f Commencement of coverage for certain volunteers serving outside United States
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (a), in the case of an individual who enrolls during a special enrollment period pursuant to , the coverage period shall begin on the first day of the month following the month in which the individual so enrolls.section 1395p(k) of this title

children.heading: Special enrollment periods for exceptional circumstances
children.label: g Special enrollment periods for exceptional circumstances
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (a), in the case of an individual who enrolls during a special enrollment period pursuant to , the coverage period shall begin on a date the Secretary provides in a manner consistent (to the extent practicable) with protecting continuity of health benefit coverage.section 1395p(m) of this title

children.heading: Coverage period for individuals only eligible for coverage of immunosuppressive drugs
children.label: h Coverage period for individuals only eligible for coverage of immunosuppressive drugs

children.text: In the case of such an individual who is deemed to have enrolled in part B for coverage of immunosuppressive drugs under , such individual’s coverage period shall begin on the first day of the month in which the individual first satisfies section 1395(b) of this title.section 1395p(n)(3) of this titleo

In the case of such an individual who enrolls (or reenrolls, if applicable) in part B for coverage of immunosuppressive drugs under paragraph (2) or (4) of , such individual’s coverage period shall begin on , or the month following the month in which the individual so enrolls (or reenrolls), whichever is later.section 1395p(n) of this titleJanuary 1, 2023
The provisions of subsections (b) and (d) shall apply with respect to an individual described in paragraph (1) or (2).

In addition to the reasons for termination under subsection (b), the coverage period of an individual described in paragraph (1) or (2) shall end when the individual becomes entitled to benefits under this subchapter under subsection (a) or (b) of , or under , or is no longer eligible for such coverage as a result of the application of section 1395(b)(2) of this title.section 426 of this titlesection 426–1 of this titleo

The Secretary may conduct public education activities to raise awareness of the availability of more comprehensive, individual health insurance coverage (as defined in ) for individuals eligible under section 1395(b) of this title to enroll or to be deemed enrolled in the medical insurance program established under this part for purposes of coverage of immunosuppressive drugs.section 300gg–91 of this titleo

children.heading: Coverage period for certain Postal Service annuitants and family members
children.label: i Coverage period for certain Postal Service annuitants and family members
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (a), in the case of an individual who enrolls during the special enrollment period pursuant to section 1395p() of this title, the coverage period shall begin on .oJanuary 1, 2025
